title: Introduction to Physical AI
text:
Course Overview
This course offers an introductory survey of the core ideas underlying Physical AI. Topics include the fundamental components of embodied AI systems, such as perception, planning, control, and both learning-based and physics-based approaches. Emphasis is placed on conceptual understanding rather than mathematical detail. The course aims to help students understand the broader landscape of Physical AI, recognize its main technical challenges, and develop a roadmap for further study.
